figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of the proposed ASMR framework consisting of a Field Generator Agent for semantic concept extraction and candidate field generation, and a Structural Optimizer Agent for RL-based schema optimization.
Figure 2: Example snapshot of the Field Generator Agent. The agent extracts semantic concepts and generates candidate schema fields for downstream schema optimization.
Figure 3: Example snapshot of the Structural Optimizer Agent operating in a stochastic RL environment for schema optimization.
